---
title: "Research"
---

## Publications

- [Modeling Long Cycles](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jeconom.2024.105751) (with Vadim Marmer)<br>
  *Journal of Econometrics*, 2024 &nbsp;[[WP]](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2010.13877.pdf)

## Working papers

- A Framework for Common Long Cycles (with James A. Duffy, Vadim Marmer and Jerome R. Simons).
- Unknown Group Structures in Econometric Models (with Joshua Catalano, Vadim Marmer, Paul Schrimpf).
